templates.description: Old format: no period after counterparty name, Fee charged: GHSx.xx
templates.example: Payment made for GHS 20.00 to LOUISA BOATENG Current Balance: GHS 1037.64 . Available Balance: GHS 1037.64 Reference: n. Transaction ID: 76664093335. Fee charged: GHS0.00 Tax charged: 0.
templates.pattern: ^Payment made for GHS (?P<amount>[\d,]+\.?\d*) to (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Z][^.]+?) Current Balance: GHS (?P<balance>[\d,]+\.?\d*)[\s.]+Available Balance:.*?Reference:\s*(?P<reference>.*?)\.\s*Transaction ID:\s*(?P<tx_id>\d+)\.\s*Fee charged:\s*GHS\s*(?P<fee>[\d.]+)
templates.notes: Balance in this format may appear as '1,037.64' or '1037.64' — strip commas when parsing

templates.description: Payment to business: phone number embedded after business name, no separator
templates.example: Payment made for GHS 62.50 to ROYAL ROSANT VENTURES 233241880380. Current Balance: GHS 7,411.57. Available Balance: GHS 7,411.57. Reference: 2. Transaction ID: 76919434871. Fee charged: GHS 0.62 TAX charged: GHS 0.00.
templates.pattern: ^Payment made for GHS (?P<amount>[\d,]+\.?\d*) to (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Z][A-Z\s]+?) (?P<counterparty_phone>23[30]\d{9}|0\d{9})\. Current Balance: GHS (?P<balance>[\d,]+\.?\d*)\.\s*Available Balance:.*?Reference:\s*(?P<reference>.*?)\. Transaction ID:\s*(?P<tx_id>\d+)\. Fee charged:\s*GHS\s*(?P<fee>[\d.]+)
templates.notes: Phone number (233XXXXXXXXX) appears directly after business name with a space, no label

templates.description: New format: period after counterparty name, TAX charged: GHS 0.00, comma-separated balance
templates.example: Payment made for GHS 35.00 to ERNESTINA ANDOH. Current Balance: GHS 1,037.64. Available Balance: GHS 1,037.64. Reference: 1. Transaction ID: 76289975115. Fee charged: GHS 0.00 TAX charged: GHS 0.00.
templates.pattern: ^Payment made for GHS (?P<amount>[\d,]+\.?\d*) to (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Z][^.]+?)\. Current Balance: GHS (?P<balance>[\d,]+\.?\d*)\.\s*Available Balance:.*?Reference:\s*(?P<reference>.*?)\. Transaction ID:\s*(?P<tx_id>\d+)\. Fee charged:\s*GHS\s*(?P<fee>[\d.]+)
templates.notes: Same tx sends BOTH v1 and v2 — deduplication required using tx_id

templates.description: Payment received from another MoMo user, with optional network source in reference
templates.example: Payment received for GHS 41.00 from SAMUEL NANA AGYEI ASANTE Current Balance: GHS 7445.59 . Available Balance: GHS 7445.59. Reference: 1. Transaction ID: 76982067554. TRANSACTION FEE: 0.00
templates.pattern: ^Payment received for GHS (?P<amount>[\d,]+\.?\d*) from (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Za-z][A-Za-z\s]+?)\s+Current Balance: GHS (?P<balance>[\d,]+\.?\d*)[\s.]+Available Balance:.*?Reference:\s*(?P<reference>.*?)\. Transaction ID:\s*(?P<tx_id>\d+)\.\s*TRANSACTION FEE:\s*(?P<fee>[\d.]+)
templates.notes: Reference field sometimes contains 'NAME,phone from VODAFONE/TELECEL' for cross-network receipts — parse sub-fields if present

templates.description: Cash withdrawal at an agent or institution
templates.example: Cash Out made for GHS200.00 to BOAFO MICROFINANCE LIMITED. Current Balance: GHS572.58 Financial Transaction Id: 76785458115. Cash-out fee is charged automatically from your MTN MoMo wallet. Please do not pay any fees to the Agent. Thank you for using MTN MobileMoney. Fee charged: GHS2.00.
templates.pattern: ^Cash Out made for GHS(?P<amount>[\d,]+\.?\d*) to (?P<counterparty_name>.+?)\. Current Balance: GHS(?P<balance>[\d,]+\.?\d*)[\s.]*Financial Transaction Id:\s*(?P<tx_id>\d+).*?Fee charged:\s*GHS(?P<fee>[\d.]+)

templates.description: Self-airtime purchase — includes date/time and External Transaction Id
templates.example: Your payment of GHS 6.00 to MTN AIRTIME has been completed at 2026-03-02 12:20:20. Your new balance: GHS 1031.64. Fee was GHS 0.00 Tax was GHS -. Reference: -. Financial Transaction Id: 76322126636. External Transaction Id: 76322126636.
templates.pattern: ^Your payment of GHS (?P<amount>[\d,]+\.?\d*) to MTN AIRTIME has been completed at (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your new balance: GHS (?P<balance>[\d,]+\.?\d*)\. Fee was GHS (?P<fee>[\d.]+).*?Financial Transaction Id:\s*(?P<tx_id>\d+)

templates.description: Payment to a named business/merchant — same opener as airtime but to a non-MTN-service recipient
templates.example: Your payment of GHS 5.00 to FIT N FINE GYM CENTER LIMITED has been completed at 2026-03-09 07:36:18. Reference: . Your new balance: GHS 47.95. Fee was GHS 0.50 Tax charged: GHS0. Financial Transaction Id: 76807586590. External Transaction Id: -.
templates.pattern: ^Your payment of GHS (?P<amount>[\d,]+\.?\d*) to (?P<counterparty_name>(?!MTN AIRTIME|MTN BUNDLE)[A-Z].+?) has been completed at (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Reference:\s*(?P<reference>.*?)\. Your new balance: GHS (?P<balance>[\d,]+\.?\d*)\. Fee was GHS (?P<fee>[\d.]+).*?Financial Transaction Id:\s*(?P<tx_id>\d+)
templates.notes: Negative lookahead in pattern prevents matching MTN AIRTIME/BUNDLE as merchant

templates.description: Generic service payment: bank push, insurance, data bundles, utilities — 'Payment for' opener (no 'made')
templates.example: Payment for GHS2700.00 to CAL Bank Push.Current Balance: GHS 4745.59. Transaction Id: 76986046852. Fee charged: GHS0.00,Tax Charged 0.
templates.pattern: ^Payment for GHS(?P<amount>[\d,]+\.?\d*) to (?P<counterparty_name>.+?)[.\s]+Current Balance: GHS (?P<balance>[\d,]+\.?\d*)[.\s]+Transaction Id[:\s]*(?P<tx_id>\d+)[.\s]+Fee charged:\s*GHS(?P<fee>[\d.]+)
templates.notes: Covers: CAL Bank Push, MiLife Insurance, MTN BUNDLE, ECG prepaid, GWCL, DSTV — anything using 'Payment for GHS' opener

templates.description: Cash deposit received at an MTN MoMo agent — note: no colon after 'Current Balance' or 'Available Balance'
templates.example: Cash In received for GHS 90.00 from APPLE CARE PLUS . Current Balance GHS 1025.14 Available Balance GHS 1025.14. Transaction ID: 76999661422. Fee charged: GHS 0. Cash in (Deposit) is a free transaction on MTN Mobile Money. Please do not pay any fees for it.
templates.pattern: ^Cash In received for GHS (?P<amount>[\d,]+\.?\d*) from (?P<counterparty_name>.+?)\s*\.\s*Current Balance GHS (?P<balance>[\d,]+\.?\d*)\s+Available Balance GHS [\d,]+\.?\d*\.\s*Transaction ID:\s*(?P<tx_id>\d+)\.\s*Fee charged:\s*GHS\s*(?P<fee>[\d.]+)
templates.notes: Agent name may have trailing space before period (APPLE CARE PLUS .) or not (KEYSBIGGLES ENTERPRISE.). Fee is always 0 — cash-in is free on MTN MoMo.
